text:
いやー、見事な海！
来るたび思わずにはいられないね！
ここで泳ぎたい、って！

リゾートとして満喫するには
まだちょっとエネミーが多すぎるかな。

なんもかんもダーカーが悪い！
さくさくっと平和にして
みんなでのんびり遊びたいよねー！

本音は最後のだけでしょ、まったく。
……ええっと、目標としている大型種は
ここの一番奥で目撃されてるみたい。

あなたにはおせっかいかもしれないけど
気をつけて進みましょう。

Isn't this ocean here something else? I can't
even think of one time I've been here and
didn't want to just dive right in!

I'd say there are still a few too many baddies
around for a relaxing day on the beach, though.

It's all because of those stinking Falspawn!
Let's wipe 'em out and secure ourselves a fine
seaside locale where we can all laze about!

Well, now that we all know where your
priorities lie... Our target was apparently
sighted a ways up ahead.

I'm sure you don't need me to remind
you that we should be careful as we make
our way there.
